mapper.sql: rt.id, rt.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, rt.task_title taskTitle, rt.task_type taskType, rt.remind_time remindTime, rt.repeat_rule repeatRule, rt.status, rt.remark, rt.create_date createDate, rt.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_reminder_task rt left join t_elder e on rt.elder_id = e.id
and e.name like concat('%', #{elderName}, '%')
and rt.task_title like concat('%', #{taskTitle}, '%')
and rt.task_type = #{taskType}
and rt.status = #{status}
order by rt.remind_time desc, rt.id desc

select
from t_reminder_task rt left join t_elder e on rt.elder_id = e.id where rt.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_reminder_task (elder_id, task_title, task_type, remind_time, repeat_rule, status, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{elderId}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskType}, #{remindTime}, #{repeatRule}, #{status}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_reminder_task set elder_id = #{elderId}, task_title = #{taskTitle}, task_type = #{taskType}, remind_time = #{remindTime}, repeat_rule = #{repeatRule}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
